notes: v1.14.82 - Command Center redesign Step 1 (scaffold, no re-home): flag-gated 3-way mode toggle (Command/Work/Ref) reusing the .subtab-strip/.stab component, plus three empty page shells (pg-cmd/pg-work/pg-ref). Hidden behind a redesign flag (?redesign=1, persisted to localStorage) so the live 5-tab field nav is completely unaffected. Routes through the existing showPage() plumbing. Nothing re-homed; both nav systems coexist. First step of the staged migration in MASTER SPEC sec 9.
